figures.caption: Table 7: BSS by category (agentic condition). Bold = beating markets.
Table 8: ∆BSS by category (agentic minus baseline). Bold = search helped. Shaded = search hurt. Bottom row: models helped / total and category average.
Table 3: ∆BSS (agentic minus baseline). Bold = search helped. Shaded = search hurt—model was better without tools.
Table 2: BSS across temporal checkpoints with web search. Bold = beating market (BSS > 0).
Table 5: BSS stratified by market difficulty (d = |pm − 0.5|): Easy d > 0.4, Medium 0.2 < d ≤ 0.4, Hard 0.1 < d ≤ 0.2, Toss-up d ≤ 0.1. Bold = beating market.
